inputs.label: Systolic Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Maximum arterial pressure during left ventricular contraction.

inputs.label: Diastolic Pressure
inputs.businessContext: Minimum arterial pressure during ventricular relaxation.

inputs.label: Rest Duration
inputs.businessContext: Minutes of rest before measurement to ensure accurate reading.

formulas.category: (systolic >= 180 || diastolic >= 120) ? 'Hypertensive Crisis' : ((systolic >= 140 || diastolic >= 90) ? 'Hypertension Stage 2' : ((systolic >= 130 || diastolic >= 80) ? 'Hypertension Stage 1' : (systolic >= 120 ? 'Elevated' : (systolic >= 90 && diastolic >= 60 ? 'Normal' : 'Low'))))
formulas.systolic_status: systolic < 90 ? 'Low' : systolic < 120 ? 'Normal' : systolic < 130 ? 'Elevated' : systolic < 140 ? 'High-Normal' : systolic < 180 ? 'Stage 1-2 Hypertension' : 'Hypertensive Crisis'
